title: Updates on the New York New Jersey Stadium World Cup final
description: Recent reports detail attendees and events at the World Cup final held at the New York New Jersey Stadium, according to news sources.

sources.title: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez to attend World Cup final against Argentina
Licensable picture: U.S. President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump during the World Cup final game between Argentina and Spain at MetLife Stadium
Who will present the World Cup trophy to the winners alongside FIFA president Gianni Infantino?

sections.heading: Political Figures in Attendance
paragraphs: According to AP News, Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez is set to attend the World Cup final against Argentina. Additionally, Reuters Connect reports on the presence of U.S. President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump during the World Cup final game between Argentina and Spain at MetLife Stadium.

sections.heading: Match Venue and Teams
paragraphs: Reuters Connect identifies the location of the World Cup final game as MetLife Stadium. The source specifies that the match is contested between Argentina and Spain.

sections.heading: Trophy Ceremony
paragraphs: World Soccer Talk discusses the upcoming trophy presentation, questioning who will present the World Cup trophy to the winners. The report notes that FIFA president Gianni Infantino will be involved in the ceremony.

faq.q: Who is attending the World Cup final?
faq.a: AP News reports that Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez will attend. Reuters Connect also notes the attendance of U.S. President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump.

faq.q: Where is the World Cup final being held?
faq.a: According to Reuters Connect, the World Cup final game between Argentina and Spain is taking place at MetLife Stadium.
World Soccer Talk reports that FIFA president Gianni Infantino will be present to present the World Cup trophy to the winners alongside another individual.

news_coverage.title: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez to attend World Cup final against Argentina
Licensable picture: U.S. President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump during the World Cup final game between Argentina and Spain at MetLife Stadium
Who will present the World Cup trophy to the winners alongside FIFA president Gianni Infantino?

review.notes: rules: all rules checks passed | reviewer(qwen-max): The article is well-structured and appropriately attributed to its sources. The only concern is a slight factual discrepancy: the title and some references in the draft mention 'New York New Jersey Stadium,' while the facts block and the sources specifically name 'MetLife Stadium.' This could be clarified for consistency.
